title: Isoloma longifolium
taxonomy: Isoloma longifolium is classified as a species within the genus Isoloma, which is part of the family Polypodiaceae, a family of ferns. The genus Isoloma is a group of epiphytic ferns native to tropical regions. This classification places Isoloma longifolium among the leptosporangiate ferns, a larger group characterized by the presence of sporangia on the underside of fronds. The family Polypodiaceae is a diverse group of ferns, with many species found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world. Isoloma longifolium's classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other fern species.
